01 · About

Two decades of turning ambitious programmes into shipped, audited, trusted software.

Results-driven Project Manager, Scrum Master and Senior QA Manager with 20+ years of progressive experience delivering complex software and GIS-based projects across government, enterprise, and international domains. I lead cross-functional teams of 20+ professionals through the full Software Development Life Cycle — from requirements engineering and Agile sprint planning to CI/CD pipeline governance and formal client acceptance testing.

I've elevated project profit margins by 9 percentage points (18% to 27%) through disciplined resource optimisation, while cutting regression test cycle durations by 60% via Selenium, Cypress and Playwright automation integrated into Jenkins and Azure DevOps. Dual-certified at CMMi Level 3 and ISO 27001, with hands-on experience managing international client relationships across South Africa, Singapore, USA, Australia and Hong Kong.

I'm currently targeting senior Project Management or QA Leadership roles where governance discipline and automation-first quality can scale a growing engineering organisation.

Stakeholder Management Shift-Left QA Risk & Change Governance Agile Delivery CI/CD Ownership Cross-Border Client Relations
